rationale: Educ. Code §29.303 concerns communication modes for deaf or hard-of-hearing students. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or school funding formulas.
quote: Students who are deaf or hard of hearing must have an education in which their unique communication mode is respected, used, and developed to an appropriate level of proficiency.
_note: No conflict. Statute is substantively unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
